Features Pricing Sign in
Now with AI summaries

Your calm
reading space

RSS, podcasts, and YouTube in one focused reader. No algorithm, no noise — just the content you choose.

Start for free → See pricing

Free plan available · No credit card required

Features
Everything you need to read well
📰

RSS, podcasts & YouTube

Add any RSS feed, podcast, or YouTube channel. All your content in one place, in the order it was published.

✨

AI summaries

Get the key points of any article in seconds. Three styles: key points, brief overview, or action items.

📖

Clean reader view

Full article text extracted and displayed in a beautiful, distraction-free reading view. No ads, no clutter.

🔍

Smart feeds

Create keyword-based feeds that filter across all your sources. Follow topics, not just publications.

🖊

Highlights & notes

Highlight passages and attach notes to articles. Your highlights are saved and searchable forever.

📱

Works everywhere

Optimized for both desktop and mobile. Swipe to archive on mobile, keyboard shortcuts on desktop.

Pricing
Simple, honest pricing
Free
$0 / month
Everything you need to get started.
  • Up to 10 feeds
  • 5 AI summaries per day
  • 3 smart feeds
  • 2 folders
  • 25 saved articles
  • Highlights
  • Full-text reader view
  • Reading stats
  • Unlimited everything
Get started free
Pro
$9 / month
For serious readers. Cancel anytime.
  • Unlimited feeds
  • Unlimited AI summaries
  • Unlimited smart feeds
  • Unlimited folders
  • Unlimited saved articles
  • Highlights & notes
  • Full-text reader view
  • Reading stats
  • Priority support
Upgrade to Pro →

Secure checkout via Stripe · Cancel anytime from your account settings
